text: Retail analytics schema for a commerce business. The schema studies clients, addresses, purchases, refunds, merchandise, marketing campaigns, stock levels, stores, fulfillment centers, website activity, mail-order activity, delivery methods, calendar dates, time of day, client profiles, household profiles, and income ranges. This is harness context for validating schema learning on a retail analytics schema.

table_descriptions.support_centers: Customer service and support center locations used to analyze assisted commerce operations.
table_descriptions.mailer_pages: Catalog or mailer page records used to analyze print-assisted shopping journeys.
table_descriptions.mail_order_refunds: Returned purchases from the mail-order channel, including refund amounts, return reasons, and client roles.
table_descriptions.mail_order_purchases: Purchases made through the mail-order channel, including pricing, discounts, shipping, and profitability.
table_descriptions.clients: Shopper account records connecting people to addresses, demographics, purchases, returns, and tenure.
table_descriptions.addresses: Client mailing and residential locations used for city, state, county, ZIP, and country analysis.
table_descriptions.client_profiles: Client demographic segments such as gender, marital status, education, credit rating, and dependents.
table_descriptions.calendar_days: Calendar reference records for daily, weekly, monthly, quarterly, yearly, and fiscal reporting.
table_descriptions.household_profiles: Household-level segments including income range, buying potential, dependents, and vehicle ownership.
table_descriptions.income_ranges: Income range bands used to classify households into economic tiers.
table_descriptions.stock_levels: Product stock counts by merchandise item, fulfillment center, and calendar day.
table_descriptions.merchandise: Product catalog records describing items sold by the business, including brand, category, color, size, and pricing.
table_descriptions.marketing_campaigns: Campaign and offer records used to analyze promoted sales across channels.
table_descriptions.return_reasons: Reference records describing why an item was returned.
table_descriptions.delivery_methods: Shipping and delivery method reference records, including carrier, service type, and contract.
table_descriptions.retail_locations: Physical store locations and operating attributes for retail-channel analysis.
table_descriptions.store_refunds: Returned purchases from physical stores, including refund amounts, reasons, and client details.
table_descriptions.store_purchases: Item-level purchases made in physical stores, including pricing, discounts, tax, and profit.
table_descriptions.clock_times: Time-of-day reference records used to analyze activity by hour, minute, second, shift, and meal period.
table_descriptions.fulfillment_centers: Fulfillment center locations used for stock storage and order shipment.
table_descriptions.site_pages: Online page records used to analyze website pages, content volume, and access timing.
table_descriptions.online_refunds: Returned purchases from the online channel, including refund amounts, return reasons, and client roles.
table_descriptions.online_purchases: Online purchases, including pricing, discounts, shipping, and profitability details.
table_descriptions.online_properties: Website or digital commerce property records used for online-channel analysis.

clients.current_client_profile_ref: Links a client to the active demographic profile.
clients.current_household_profile_ref: Links a client to the active household profile.
clients.current_address_ref: Links a client to the active address.

addresses.state: US state abbreviation for the client address.
addresses.zip: Postal ZIP code for the client address.

store_purchases.client_ref: Client connected to the store purchase.
store_purchases.merchandise_ref: Merchandise item sold in the store purchase.
store_purchases.sale_calendar_day_ref: Calendar day when the store purchase occurred.
store_purchases.net_paid: Net amount paid by the shopper for the store purchase.

online_purchases.billing_client_ref: Client billed for the online purchase.
online_purchases.merchandise_ref: Merchandise item sold through the online purchase.
online_purchases.sale_calendar_day_ref: Calendar day when the online purchase occurred.
online_purchases.net_paid: Net amount paid by the shopper for the online purchase.

glossary.client: A person or account buying from the business.
glossary.merchandise: A product sold by the business.
glossary.campaign: A marketing offer, discount, or sales activation.
glossary.refund: A returned purchase or returned item.
glossary.mail-order: Commerce through catalog or mailer channels.
glossary.online: Commerce through website or digital channels.
glossary.stock level: Available product quantity at a fulfillment center.
glossary.profile: A demographic segment record used to classify clients or households.
